calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On August 6,2002.
Off Calendar Aug-06-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on calendar this day for default prove-up hearing. Plaintiff Bette Bronstein, represented by her counsel, Tyree Jones, Esq., is sworn and examined. Exhibits marked and introuced per the record. Court awards judgment to plaintiff and against defendant as follows: Principal $85,000 Interest, $15,206.00; Costs $390.00 and attorney fees $5,000; for the total sum of $105,596.46. Court orders all exhibits returned to the plaintiff for safekeeping.
